name: George Fenneman
abstract: George Watt Fenneman (November 10, 1919 – May 29, 1997) was an American radio and television announcer. Fenneman is best remembered as the show announcer and straight man on Groucho Marx's You Bet Your Life.

concerts.label: Julie and Carol at Carnegie Hall

about_quotes.speaker: David Brinkley
about_quotes.evidence: The transcript mentions 'George Fenneman, speaking for the Douglas Fir Plywood Association' as part of a commercial break narration, with no personal interaction or relationship described between the interviewee (David Brinkley) and George Fenneman.
